film.title: Jodi No. 1
film.overview: Partners in crime Jai and Veeru set their next target on a rich businessman, Rai Bahadur. Things turn hilarious when both of them fall for his daughters.

dialogues.dialogue: You'll have to tell me. - Actually....due to his father he can't face anybody. See, how he's hiding his face. - But what is the matter? Shame. Should I confide in him? - Yes. His father remarried.
You've secured a gold medal in business management. Now is the time to show your mettle. What a shame! - What did you say? Nothing uncle. What do you expect from us?
dialogues.cause_raw: not living up to expectations despite having a degree

dialogues.dialogue: I'm not a thief. This is what every thief says on being caught. Aren't you ashamed? - But I'm not a thief. Did you come here to steal my stories? This is crazy.

You can expect honesty from us. By joining hands with us you can expect better quality. And you can be proud of us. And I can confidently say....that these eminent people can invest money in your company...but we'll invest our mind and soul in this project. And I think I am right. Brother Jai, am I right? I think I am right.

Gentlemen, I could've completed this contract in any country. But this emotion for my country brought me here. I'll feel proud working with such youth. I hand over this contract to you, gentleman. - Sir! Thank you very much. I can't tell you how much I love you.
dialogues.cause_raw: working with youth of his country
